title: Documentation, Maintenance and Project Handoff
objective: 完成用户手册、管理员手册、开发者文档、架构留档和长期维护计划，为 Personal Knowledge Asset OS 的后续迭代和交接提供自包含资料

tasks.title: Write public user manual
acceptance_criteria: Manual explains how readers use library, notes, graph, projects, timeline and resume surfaces
Manual avoids internal implementation detail unless useful to readers

tasks.title: Write admin manual
acceptance_criteria: Manual covers source sync, preview, whitelist review, publish manifest and quality gates
Manual explains local-only admin assumptions and production exposure risks
Manual includes recovery steps for common admin workflow errors

tasks.title: Write developer guide
acceptance_criteria: Guide covers local setup, scripts, test commands, API structure and source adapters
Guide explains how to add new content types or preview adapters
Guide includes coding and PRD synchronization conventions

tasks.title: Create final architecture document
acceptance_criteria: Architecture document explains source truth, admin, public projection, API, preview and deployment boundaries
Data flow diagrams identify private and public data transitions
Permission levels and external write gates are visible in the architecture
tasks.notes: Use diagrams where they clarify the system.

tasks.title: Write troubleshooting and maintenance archive
acceptance_criteria: Troubleshooting covers build failures, preview failures, API failures, content leaks and deployment incidents
Maintenance archive records recurring commands and known environment blockers
Critical privacy or deployment incidents have escalation guidance

tasks.title: Create final handoff and next roadmap
acceptance_criteria: Handoff summarizes completed capabilities, remaining risks and operational rules
Next roadmap distinguishes near-term improvements from experimental ideas
Project can be resumed by a future maintainer without reconstructing context from chat
